title: Dalek Mod: Door Panel
description: A Dalek Mod addon that adds in a door control panel to open, close, lock, and unlock your TARDIS!
body:
# DM Door Panel Addon
A [Dalek Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod) addon that adds in a door control panel used to open, close, lock, and unlock your TARDIS!
This control also sync's with interior doors and the exterior!
